creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
This has been discussed several times in the past already so I don't
see the point of discussing it again.

The discussion is archived, though, so if you're interested to read
up on it you could start with:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=187926
and the archive of freebsd-ports@.
